actionability-priority.description: Favor high-value entities with strong actionability and near-complete momentum.

blocker-rescue.description: Escalate high-value entities with severe blockers for manual/governance rescue.

balanced-completion.description: Blend value and actionability while reserving visibility for severe blockers and carryover rescue.
